context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.role: Echo's primary resting position, central gameplay element
context.screen_position: Horizontal bar at y=80, spanning x=24 to x=104
context.usage_scenario: Always visible, Echo stands on this perch in all non-sleeping states

visual_specification.texture: Wood grain suggested by 1px horizontal lines
visual_specification.outline: 1px dark outline (#1D2B53) on top and bottom edges
visual_specification.details: Brown wooden bar (#AB5236) 80px wide and 4px tall, positioned at y=80, top edge has 1px highlight (#FFCCAA) to suggest roundness, bottom has 1px shadow (#5F574F), ends connect to cage sides (implied)

relationships.shared_with: All Echo states use this as standing position

explicit_negations: No rope or chain attachments visible
No texture beyond simple wood grain
No interactive elements (purely visual reference point)
